settings.content: Do not edit these values unless there is a specific reason to.

settings.label: Breakpoint (Mobile)
settings.info: In rem, assuming that the root size is 16px.

settings.label: Breakpoint (Tablet)
settings.info: In rem, assuming that the root size is 16px.

definition.label: Highlights
definition.info: Used on paragraph hyperlinks by default, and other links on hover (like header/footer nav, and elements with class .link).

settings.label: <link> or <script> code (accepts Liquid)
settings.default: <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com"><link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin> <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Raleway:wght@400;900&family=Roboto:ital,wght@0,400;0,700;1,400&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
settings.info: Will be printed in the site's <head>

settings.label: @fontface (accepts Liquid)
settings.info: To be printed in base.css. Do not use the @import queries (deprecated). Upload fonts to FILES (not Theme Assets) for compatibility.

settings.label: Font size scale (Desktop)
settings.info: 100% being 16px

settings.label: Font size scale (Mobile)
settings.info: 100% being 14px

settings.label: Letter Spacing
settings.info: This value will be divided by 10, so 0.5 is 0.05em.

settings.label: Letter Spacing
settings.info: This value will be divided by 10, so 0.5 is 0.05em.

settings.label: Letter Spacing
settings.info: This value will be divided by 10, so 0.5 is 0.05em.

settings.label: Letter Spacing
settings.info: This value will be divided by 10, so 0.5 is 0.05em.

settings.label: Letter Spacing
settings.info: This value will be divided by 10, so 0.5 is 0.05em.

settings.label: Full width on mobile
settings.info: (where supported)

settings.content: These styles apply to the CTAs that have the 'Links' style applied (some can be defined on a section basis, most come by default like 'Forgot your password?' on the login form).

settings.label: Letter spacing
settings.info: This value will be divided by 10, so 0.5 is 0.05em.

settings.content: These styles apply to all the 'input', 'textarea' and 'select' fields throughout the site, including the Search field, Newsletter, Sort By (on the PLP), etc.

settings.label: Font size (Desktop)
settings.info: On Mobile the fields must be 16px.

settings.label: Letter spacing
settings.info: This value will be divided by 10, so 0.5 is 0.05em.

settings.label: Letter spacing
settings.info: This value will be divided by 10, so 0.5 is 0.05em.

settings.label: Letter spacing
settings.info: This value will be divided by 10, so 0.5 is 0.05em.

settings.content: This section refers to the tinted overlay behind the pop-ups, the side-cart, the mobile menu, and the overlay that covers the entire screen (with a spinning wheel in the middle) when an action is being performed/processed.
These settings apply to the following modals: 'Cart', 'Login/Register', 'Filters', 'Mobile Menu'.

settings.label: Letter spacing
settings.info: This value will be divided by 10, so 0.5 is 0.05em.

settings.content: Such as summary and free shipping on the side cart, and bottom content of the mobile menu.

settings.label: Side arrows visibility
settings.info: When using 'Show on hover', arrows are hidden on mobile. When 'Always visible', arrows are displayed on mobile only if there is no visual clue of the slider, for example when there are no dots and there is no partial view of the next slide.

settings.label: Show slider pages
settings.info: When enabled, the page number and total pages are displayed on the right of the Dots if their shape is 'line', or between arrows if the shape is 'circle'.

settings.label: Enable global newsletter popup
settings.info: The popup settings can be edited on the Section called 'Newsletter Popup' once this option is enabled.

settings.label: Menu containing navigation tree
settings.info: IMPORTANT: The breadcrumb tree only works on pages of any kind that are linked in the navigation menu. The header menu usually is a good option to use here. Also remember that Shopify only allows up to 3 levels of nested menus.

settings.label: Use Shopify predictive search API
settings.info: Instead of the standard search API. This feature allows to include collections in the results, but with drawbacks. Predictive and standard search functionalities should list the same products, however the standard search is more tolerant to typo errors so it might show more results, besides it is consistent with the Search Page results.

settings.label: Popular search terms
settings.info: Comma separated search terms.

settings.label: Visually hide the side cart
settings.info: Useful when a 3rd party Cart is used, such as Rebuy's.

settings.label: Hide Cart Page
settings.info: When checked, the user that navigates to the Cart page will be automatically redirected to the homepage with the Side-cart open.

settings.label: Threshold
settings.info: Leave the field empty (value 0) to disable the Free shipping progress bar.

settings.label: Default status
settings.info: [value] will be replaced by the amount left to achieve free shipping.

settings.label: Label
settings.default: Add a gift message to your order

settings.content: Popups with information from other pages

settings.label: Collection
settings.info: Select a collection to enable this feature. A product slider will appear in the cart page and side cart.

settings.label: Update price by quantity
settings.info: When true, product prices will be multiplied by quantity. Otherwise, will show product unit price.

settings.label: Options that require manual selection
settings.info: (case sensitive). Comma separated names of variant options that require the customer to manually select a value from each, and the Add to Cart button is disabled until those options are chosen. Note: you can use the '*' character to indicate that all options must be manually selected.

settings.label: Color swatches
settings.info: Name of the options that should be displayed as Color Swatches, separated by comma (case sensitive).

settings.label: CSS
settings.info: Use the Color Swatches Helper section to build this code. Format of the class path should be .color-[variant-color-handle], for example .color-rose-gold

settings.label: Label swatches
settings.info: Name of the options that should be displayed as Label Swatches, separated by comma (case sensitive).

settings.content: The options not listed above, will be displayed as Drop-downs.

settings.label: 'Sale' or '% Off' badge text
settings.info: Displayed when the 'price_min' is lower than 'compare_at_price_min'. Use the label [percent] as placeholder of the value. Disabled when value is empty.

settings.label: Display this badge as a round bubble on PLP
settings.info: For the number to be larger on top, wrap the word [percent]% within the tags , like this: [percent]%

settings.label: 'Sold out' badge text
settings.info: Displayed when the product is sold out. Disabled when value is empty.

settings.label: Custom product badges
settings.info: Comma separated product tags, for example: Best Seller, New Arrival. Displayed when the product contains the specified tags. Only the first matching tag is displayed.

settings.label: CSS
settings.info: Format of the class path should be .badge.[badge handle], for example: .badge.best-seller {background: #f2e3c5; color: #000;}

settings.label: Disable quick shop on Homepage
settings.info: Improves Homepage performance when showing many products

settings.label: Color swatches quantity limit
settings.info: 0 = no limit. Example: 4 = show first 4 swatches, and '+N more' text

settings.label: Show reviews rating ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐
settings.info: Pull rating value from the Shopify native reviews.rating metafield.

settings.label: CTA style
settings.info: When the last option is selected, the CTA will show 'Add to cart' for Quick Shop product cards or 'Shop Now' for normal product cards.

settings.label: Bottom content alignment
settings.info: For Quick Shop product cards. The value 'Bottom' could be useful in very specific situations, e.g. when titles length vary too much but the rest of the cards (callouts + swatches) is pretty uniform. Otherwise 'Top' combined with Match of title height is recommended.

settings.label: Show callouts
settings.info: When enabled, pull callout items from a 'custom.callouts' product metafield, which must be a list of type 'Metaobject' referencing a 'Callout' metaobject definition. This metaobject definition must have 3 fields: Name (single line text), Color (Color), Image (Image file).

settings.label: Enable
settings.info: 'Merge variants is a single page functionality. Features: Metafield/metaobjects setup; Only updates images, price and variant options; PDPs load slower the more products are linked.

settings.content: Products must use the 'custom.linked_products_group' metafield (namespace.key) to reference a metaobject with a property 'products' containing a list of products that must be merged

settings.label: Also merge variants in product cards

settings.content: WARNING: This feature only works when the Combined Product has only ONE additional OPTION.

settings.label: Combined Listing support mode
settings.info: Choose how combined products work: 'Redirect to product page' (shows full child product content, supports all apps), 'Single page, load sections async' (shows main content of child products, some apps may not work).

settings.label: Truncate words
settings.info: Use 0 to hide the description. Use 100 to show the entire description.

settings.label: CTA label
settings.info: Leave blank to hide

settings.label: Open in new tab
settings.info: Recommended when using Infinite Scroll or Load more

settings.label: Additional menu links
settings.info: Menu containing additional links for the customer portal menu.

settings.label: Show in Header
settings.info: Only if the announcement bar is enabled.

settings.label: Show in Header
settings.info: Only if the announcement bar is enabled.

settings.label: Submit contact & newsletter form using AJAX.
settings.info: This allows for better UX, as it doesn't refresh the page when the customer submits the form. CRITICAL: This should be disabled if the store is using a captcha solution for contact and comment forms.

settings.content: The Theme will use Shopify's default newsletter signup unless Klaviyo is set up below.

settings.label: Use Klaviyo Form
settings.info: Instead of Shopify's default Subscription Form

settings.label: List ID
settings.info: It should look like this: P8RBDS

settings.label: Enable subscription options in product cards
Allow changing purchase option in cart
Combine options into a single Delivery dropdown
Keep delivery dropdown visible
settings.info: Show the delivery frequency options even if the One-Time option is selected.

settings.label: Favicon image
settings.info: Will be scaled down to 100 x 100px

settings.label: Reviews source
settings.info: The source of the aggregate rating. Shopify standard also includes: Okendo and JudgeMe.

settings.content: Not supported: 1) BazaarVoice, although it adds the rating schema automatically; 2) Yotpo Reviews, though it uses standard metafields, they are not always synchronized realtime with the reviews displayed by the widgets which can harm SEO.

settings.label: Enable /cart.js Cache
settings.info: Monitor ajax calls to the cart and store the last read request in cache for faster access.

settings.label: Use line index in cart update.js api
settings.info: Replace cart updates by line_item key using line index instead. This is a workaround to a couple of issues caused on Shopify's end when it splits line items while applying some discount causing a duplicated keys in different line items, which then leaves to big problems when trying to update items using the update.js api.

settings.label: Enable _grid_layout cart attribute
settings.info: When true, the customer's PLP layout will be stored in a cart attribute which is used to render the PLP items, that way the Grid is rendered with the correct layout instead of flickering from the default layout to the customer's selected value, sometimes customers would be able to perceive this layout shift. The disadvantage is that this attribute is passed to the order.

settings.label: Enable dual sticky panels Up/Down
settings.info: When true, a custom made element, 'sticky-updown', takes care of handling the scroll position of sticky panels so when scrolling you can reach the end of them before becoming sticky. Useful for long main sections of PDPs to provide a better UX.

settings.content: Experimental Feature to improve page load time. [Documentation](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/API/Speculation_Rules_API)

WARNING: this feature can trigger server side analytic events like PageView even if the user doesn't get redirected, resulting in wrong analytics data. We hope Shopify fixes this issue in the future. Additionally, this feature must not trigger requests on urls that affect user state or data, like /account/logout or /cart, therefore we only prefetch the following elements: homepage, /collections, /products, /pages, /blogs

settings.label: Enable
settings.info: This makes use of an experimental browser feature. We start fetching page content on mousedown/touchstart/hover events triggered on links. Code can be edited to change between prefetch/prerender strategies or disable onHover event.

settings.content: IMPORTANT: disable prefetch if you are analyzing performance, because browser stats will be incorrect, specially in the Network panel.
